title: TGIIC Achieves Rs 51.25 Crores Per Acre, Strong Bids Across Plots
description: Plot No 1, measuring 10.09 acres, set a new benchmark by achieving Rs 51.25 crore per acre, marking a 30 per cent-plus premium over the reserve price of `39 crore per acre, following an intense bidding contest among leading developers. The plot was secured by Rajapushpa.
